evals.expected_output: A short, friendly reply that asks what the user wants to work on, with no tool use or invented task.
expectations: Responds in a warm, brief tone
Asks an open question inviting the user's actual request
Does not invent a task or list capabilities at length

evals.expected_output: A brief greeting back plus a prompt for what the user needs today.
expectations: Keeps it to roughly one or two sentences
